sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; /** * DashboardPreview component - Shows a composed preview of the dashboard with calendar and side panels * @param {Object} props - Component props * @param {string} props.title - Preview section title * @param {string} props.subtitle - Preview section subtitle * @param {Object} props.leaveBalances - Object with EL, SL, CL balances * @param {Array} props.longWeekends - Array of long weekend objects * @param {string} props.currentMonth - Current month for calendar display * @param {Array} props.highlightedDates - Array of dates to highlight in calendar */ const DashboardPreview = ({ title = "See PlanWise in Action", subtitle = "Your smart leave planning dashboard", leaveBalances = { EL: 12, SL: 8, CL: 3 }, longWeekends = [ { date: "Mar 15-18", days: 4, type: "upcoming" }, { date: "Apr 19-22", days: 4, type: "upcoming" }, { date: "May 24-27", days: 4, type: "upcoming" } ], currentMonth = "March 2024", highlightedDates = [15, 16, 22] }) => { return (

{title}

{subtitle}

{/* Left: Calendar Preview */}

{currentMonth}

{/* Calendar Grid */}
{/* Day Headers */} {['S', 'M', 'T', 'W', 'T', 'F', 'S'].map((day, i) => (
{day}
))} {/* Calendar Dates */} {Array.from({length: 28}, (_, i) => { const date = i + 1; const isHighlighted = highlightedDates.includes(date); return (
{date}
); })}
{/* Calendar Legend */}
Vacation
Holiday
Long Weekend
{/* Right: Side Panels */}
{/* Leave Balances Card */}
Leave Balances
Earned Leave (EL) {leaveBalances.EL} days
Sick Leave (SL) {leaveBalances.SL} days
Casual Leave (CL) {leaveBalances.CL} days
{/* Long Weekends Card */}
Long Weekends
{longWeekends.map((weekend, index) => (
{weekend.date}
{weekend.days} days off
))}
); }; export default DashboardPreview;
